statements.select:
select a.username, a.email loginemail ,a.password, a.pwdupdate, a.role, a.failcount ,b.id ,b.mid,b.pid ,b.realname,b.nickname,b.gender,b.birthdat ,b.zipcode,b.address,b.phone,b.mobile,b.fax,b.website ,b.email,b.jemail,b.facebook ,b.degree,b.school,b.major,b.skill ,b.jobcomp,b.jobtitle,b.teachunit,b.acadetype,b.history,b.showoff,b.active ,b.regyear ,b.offreason,b.offdate from member a left join memdetail b on a.id=b.mid where b.id is not null
and a.email = #UserName#
and convert(varchar, b.birthdat, 103) = convert(varchar, #Birthday#, 103)
and b.pid = #Pid#
select password, getdate() as date from member where id=#mid# union select password, modifydate as date from passwordhistory where mid=#mid# order by date desc
select top 1 * from LoginLog where username = #UserName# order by createtime desc
select top 1 * from LoginLog where username = #UserName# AND logtype='LOGINFAIL' order by createtime desc
